heading: Jurisdiction and venue of civil actions by or against Bank
label: 290o–5 Jurisdiction and venue of civil actions by or against Bank

children.heading: Jurisdiction
children.label: a Jurisdiction
children.text: The United States district courts shall have original and exclusive jurisdiction of any civil action brought in the United States by or against the Bank.

children.heading: Venue
children.label: b Venue
children.text: For purposes of , the Bank shall be deemed to be a resident of the judicial district in which the principal office of the Bank in the United States, or its agent appointed for the purpose of accepting service or notice of service, is located.section 1391(b) of title 28
